title: Schema Validation & Error Standardization
requirements:
Full JSON Schema validation with AJV. Consistent error output from all scripts.

1. Replace custom validator with standalone AJV:
   - Bundle AJV + ajv-formats as standalone script using esbuild: scripts/ajv-bundle.js
   - Self-contained, runs with just node scripts/ajv-bundle.js
   - Rewrite scripts/validate-schemas.js:
     - Use bundled AJV with draft 2020-12 support
     - Validate types, patterns, enums, nested objects, $ref resolution
     - Mode 1 (no args): validate all schema files are valid schemas
     - Mode 2 (data.json schema_name): validate data file against named schema
     - Output: JSON with valid (bool), errors[] (path, message, expected)
   - Preserve existing exit codes (0=valid, 1=invalid)

2. Add schema validation to write points:
   - Update scripts/write-conflict-json.sh: validate output against conflict.schema.json before writing
   - Update scripts/run-secret-scan.sh: validate SECRETS.json against secrets.schema.json before writing
   - Update scripts/update-prd-status.sh: validate PRD.json after status update
   - Update scripts/auto-repair.sh record: validate entry against repair.schema.json
   - Update scripts/agent-learning.sh write: validate entry against agent-learning.schema.json
   - On validation failure: log ERROR, write invalid data to {file}.invalid.json for debugging, exit 1

3. Standardize script error output:
   - Create scripts/output.sh sourced by all scripts:
     - emit_result() { echo "{\"status\":\"$1\",\"data\":$2}"; }
     - emit_error() { echo "{\"status\":\"error\",\"error\":\"$1\",\"exit_code\":${2:-1}}"; exit ${2:-1}; }
   - Update all scripts to use emit_error for error exits
   - Prioritize scripts that compose: resolve-repo.sh, validate-branch-name.sh, merge-base-into-feature.sh

4. Write tests:
   - Test AJV validator against all existing schema files (expect all valid)
   - Test with intentionally malformed PRD.json (expect specific error messages)
   - Test with invalid enum value (expect pattern/enum error)
   - Test schema validation at write points (expect invalid data caught)
   - Test standardized error output from 3+ scripts
acceptance_criteria: scripts/ajv-bundle.js exists as self-contained AJV bundle
scripts/validate-schemas.js uses AJV with draft 2020-12 support
validate-schemas.js supports both modes: schema-only validation and data-against-schema validation
All write-point scripts validate JSON output against schemas before writing
Invalid data written to .invalid.json for debugging on validation failure
scripts/output.sh exists with emit_result and emit_error functions
All composing scripts (resolve-repo.sh, validate-branch-name.sh, merge-base-into-feature.sh) use emit_error
